scripts.dev: npm run dev:clean && npm run dev:ssr && npm run dev:migrate && npm run dev:seed && stmux -- [ [ "npm run dev:vite" .. "npm run dev:wrangler" ] : "sh dev-url.sh" ]
scripts.dev:clean: rm -rf .wrangler dev-logs && mkdir -p dev-logs && echo 'clean' > dev-logs/clean
scripts.dev:ssr: vite build --ssr src/entry-server.ts --outDir dist/server && echo 'ssr' > dev-logs/ssr
scripts.dev:migrate: echo y | wrangler d1 migrations apply learntensors-db --local && echo 'migrate' > dev-logs/migrate
scripts.dev:seed: wrangler d1 execute learntensors-db --local --file=seed.sql && echo 'seed' > dev-logs/seed
scripts.build: npm run build:ty-wasm && vue-tsc -b && vite build && vite build --ssr src/entry-server.ts --outDir dist/server
